DISCOVERY 610, PLAINTIFF SCHWARTZ COMMUNICATIONS, INC.'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; AND FOR SANCTIONS, GRANTED IN PART: A. WITHIN FIVE DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER, DEFENDANTS, IF THEY HAVE NOT ALREADY DONE SO, SHALL SERVE ORIGINAL VERIFICATIONS IN SUPPORT OF THEIR RESPONSE TO INTERROGATORIES AND RESPONSES TO DEMAND FOR INSPECTION OF DOCUMENTS; B. AS A SANCTION, WITHIN FIVE DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER, DEFENDANTS SHALL REIMBURSE PLAINTIFF FOR ITS FILING FEE IN CONNECTION WITH THIS MOTION. COMMISSIONER: PAUL SLAVIT. NOT REPORTED.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Order To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Responses To Demand For Inspection Of Documents And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff Schwartz Communications, Inc.'s motion to compel answers to interrogatories and responses to demand for inspection of documents; and for sanctions, granted in part:
a. Within five days of notice of entry of this order, defendants, if they have not already done so, shall serve original verifications in support of their response to interrogatories and responses to demand for inspection of documents;
b. As a sanction, within five days of notice of entry of this order, defendants shall reimburse plaintiff for its filing fee in connection with this motion. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

Notice And Motion For Order To Have Facts And Documents Deemed Admitted And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Aug-31-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's motion for order to have facts and documents deemed admitted; and for sanctions granted in part:
a. Within five days of notice of entry of this order, defendants, if they have not already done so, shall serve original verifications in support of their response to plaintiff's request for admissions;
b. As a sanction, within five days of notice of entry of this order, defendants shall reimburse plaintiff for its filing fee in connection with this motion. Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.
